sql_array: CREATE TABLE GeometryData (id INT PRIMARY KEY, geom GEOMETRY, ShippedDate DATETIME);
INSERT INTO GeometryData (id, geom, ShippedDate) VALUES (1, bif:st_geomFromText('POINT(1 1)', 4326), '2000-01-01 12:00:00'), (2, bif:st_geomFromText('POINT(2 2)', 4326), '2001-01-01 12:00:00');
SELECT datestring(now()), bif:st_intersects(geom, bif:st_geomFromText('POINT(1 1)', 4326)) FROM GeometryData WHERE ShippedDate < datestring('2001-02-01 00:00:00') AND ShippedDate IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*), left(datestring(ShippedDate), 10) AS DatePart FROM GeometryData GROUP BY DatePart HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
CREATE TABLE TestTable (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO TestTable (id, value, created_at) VALUES (1, 'test', '2001-01-01 12:00:00'), (2, 'example', NULL), (3, NULL, datestring(now()));
SELECT datestring(created_at), COUNT(*) FROM TestTable GROUP BY datestring(created_at) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

SELECT bif:st_intersects(geom, bif:st_geomFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 3 0, 3 3, 0 3, 0 0))', 4326)), datestring(ShippedDate) FROM GeometryData WHERE bif:st_intersects(geom, bif:st_geomFromText('POLYGON((1 1, 2 1, 2 2, 1 2, 1 1))', 4326)) = TRUE;

SELECT datestring_gmt(ShippedDate), sum(id) OVER (PARTITION BY left(datestring(ShippedDate), 7)) AS monthly_total FROM GeometryData WHERE ShippedDate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY datestring_gmt(ShippedDate) DESC;
SELECT value, bif:st_intersects(geom, bif:st_geomFromText('LINESTRING(0 0, 2 2)', 4326)) AS intersects FROM GeometryData WHERE CAST(NULL AS DATETIME) < ShippedDate;
